scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix crm-backend && npm install --prefix channel-service && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "CRM,CHANNEL,FRONTEND" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,magenta" "npm run dev --prefix crm-backend" "npm run dev --prefix channel-service" "npm run dev --prefix frontend"
scripts.setup: npm run install:all && npm run seed
